channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Thailand counts votes in early election with 3 main parties vying for power
item.description: Vote counting was underway in Thailand's early general election on Sunday, seen as a three-way race among competing visions of progressive, populist a...

item.title: Breezy Johnson's downhill gold is America's first medal of 2026 Winter Olympics
item.description: Breezy Johnson's first Olympic medal is a gold, won in a race marred by the crash of teammate Lindsey Vonn

item.title: Trump administration lauds plastic surgeons' statement on trans surgery for minors
item.description: A patient who came to regret the top surgery she got as a teen won a $2 million malpractice suit. Then, the American Society of Plastic Surgeons clari...

item.title: US ski star Lindsey Vonn crashes in Olympic downhill race
item.description: In an explosive crash near the top of the downhill course in Cortina, Vonn landed a jump perpendicular to the slope and tumbled to a stop shortly belo...

item.title: U.K. leader's chief of staff quits over hiring of Epstein friend as U.S. ambassador
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer's chief of staff resigned Sunday over the furor surrounding the appointment of Peter Mandelson as U.K. ambassador ...

item.title: Thai PM claims election victory as early results show conservatives ahead
item.description: Thai voters are choosing between sweeping change or more of the same in an election called after several coalition governments collapsed.

item.title: Italian police arrest protesters after clash in Olympic host city Milan
item.description: At least six people have been detained a week after a different demonstration in Turin turned violent.

item.title: Japan's governing party projected to win snap election majority
item.description: A coalition led by current Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi is expected to clinch a decisive win, according to media projections after polls closed.

item.title: The teams and players with the most Super Bowl wins in NFL history
item.description: Ahead of Super Bowl 2026 today, Feb. 8, here's a list of the teams and players with the most Super Bowl wins in NFL history.

item.title: US skier Vonn crashes in downhill run while competing with torn ACL
item.description: American superstar skier Lindsey Vonn "deserved a better ending" after suffering heartbreak in what could be her final Olympic event as she crashes in...

item.title: Lindsey Vonn crashes out in women's downhill race at 2026 Winter Olympics
item.description: Lindsey Vonn, who came out of retirement to compete in the 2026 Milano Cortina Winter Games, was airlifted off the mountain.

item.title: 3 Doors Down lead singer Brad Arnold dies at 47
item.description: The Mississippi-born frontman of the popular rock band had announced a stage 4 cancer diagnosis in May 2025.

item.title: Breezy Johnson wins Team USA's first gold medal of 2026 Winter Olympics
item.description: Breezy Johnson took the lead early on after flying down the mountain in 1:36.10. It is her first-ever Olympic medal.

item.title: Starmer's aide quits over ambassador appointment despite Epstein links
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer's chief of staff, Morgan McSweeney, said he took responsibility for advising Starmer to appoint Peter Mandelson.

item.title: Athletes to watch from Team USA at the Winter Olympics
item.description: American athletes are going for the gold at the 2026 Milano Cortina Winter Olympics. These are some of the top Team USA competitors to watch.

item.title: Savannah Guthrieâs demand for momâs âproof of lifeâ is complicated in this era of AI and deepfakes
Trumpâs racist post about Obamas is deleted after backlash despite White House earlier defending it
Sheriff searching for Savannah Guthrieâs missing mom calls lack of video a disappointing setback
item.description: The sheriff investigating the apparent abduction of âTodayâ show host Savannah Guthrieâs mother says itâs frustrating that a camera at Nancy Guthrieâs...
